channel.title: AI News — A Guide to Cloud & AI
channel.description: Daily AI news digest — curated headlines, summaries and trends

item.title: 'Invisible mouse' made a mess of PC rebuild
item.description: An article discusses a reader's chaotic experience while attempting to rebuild a PC, highlighting the challenges of managing a messy workspace. It illustrates the difficulties of fixing problems without clear visibility.

item.title: NASA working on ‘Big Bang’ upgrade to keep the Voyagers alive for longer
item.description: NASA is developing a plan called 'The Big Bang' to extend the operational life of the Voyager probes after a recent power glitch. This upgrade is crucial for maintaining communication with these historic spacecraft.

item.title: Indonesia’s game rating system paused amid claims it leaked developer creds and glimpses of major new titles
item.description: Indonesia has paused its game rating system due to allegations of leaking developer credentials and footage of unreleased games. This suspension raises concerns about data security in the gaming industry.

item.title: I asked ChatGPT and Gemini how much home loan I can afford on ₹7–9 lakh income. The answer wasn’t what I expected
item.description: A user sought advice from ChatGPT and Gemini on home loan affordability based on a salary of ₹7-9 lakh, revealing unexpected insights from the AI tools. The interaction showcases the practical applications of AI in financial planning.

item.title: Leak: Apple Testing Four Distinct Frame Styles for Upcoming 2027 Smart Glasses
item.description: Apple is reportedly testing four different frame styles for its upcoming smart glasses, set to launch in 2027. This development could significantly impact the wearable technology market.

item.title: Mozilla’s Thunderbolt Is an Open-Source AI Client, but What Exactly Is It?
item.description: Mozilla has introduced Thunderbolt, an open-source AI client designed to give organizations greater control over their AI models and workflows. This tool aims to enhance transparency and customization in AI usage.

item.title: openhost 0.4.0
item.description: The article introduces openhost 0.4.0, a tool that allows users to run local large language models from Python, compatible with LangChain. This development supports local AI model deployment.

item.title: captain-nemo 0.3.72
item.description: Captain-nemo 0.3.72 is a coding agent daemon connected to Lark, powered by the Claude Agent SDK. This tool aims to streamline coding tasks through AI assistance.

item.title: claude-tap 0.1.29
item.description: Claude-tap 0.1.29 is a tool that allows users to trace Claude Code API requests via a local reverse proxy, enabling inspection of system prompts and token usage. This aids in debugging and optimizing API interactions.

item.title: pyg-nightly 2.8.0.dev20260419
item.description: Pyg-nightly 2.8.0.dev20260419 is a Graph Neural Network library for PyTorch, aimed at facilitating advanced machine learning applications. This library supports the growing interest in graph-based AI models.

item.title: socratic-nexus 0.3.4
item.description: Socratic Nexus 0.3.4 is a universal client for large language models, compatible with various LLMs and featuring integrations with Openclaw and LangChain. This development enhances accessibility for developers working with multiple AI models.

item.title: captain-nemo 0.3.71
item.description: Captain Nemo 0.3.71 is a coding agent daemon that connects with Lark and utilizes the Claude Agent SDK. This tool aims to improve coding efficiency through AI integration.

item.title: geny-executor 0.20.0
item.description: Geny Executor 0.20.0 is an agent pipeline library featuring a 16-stage dual-abstraction architecture, built on the Anthropic API. This architecture aims to optimize AI task execution.

item.title: nteract 2.2.1a202604190553
item.description: Nteract 2.2.1a202604190553 enhances Jupyter notebooks by integrating AI capabilities, supporting various agents like Claude and ChatGPT. This integration allows for more interactive and intelligent data analysis.

item.title: gemcode 0.3.108
item.description: Gemcode 0.3.108 is a local-first coding agent designed for Google Gemini, focusing on user privacy and performance. This approach allows developers to work more securely with AI.

item.title: tachikoma-agent 1.30.3
item.description: Tachikoma Agent 1.30.3 is a proactive personal assistant built on the Claude Agent SDK, designed to enhance personal productivity through AI assistance. This tool aims to support users in managing daily tasks.

item.title: AI Fitness Recovery Solutions Gain Popularity
item.description: AI fitness recovery solutions are gaining popularity, reflecting a growing trend in integrating AI into personal health and fitness. These solutions aim to enhance recovery processes for athletes and fitness enthusiasts.

item.title: GitHub Copilotを自分好みにカスタマイズする copilot-instructions.md
item.description: A guide on customizing GitHub Copilot offers users tips on tailoring the AI tool to better fit their coding preferences. This customization can enhance user experience and productivity.

item.title: Cerebras files for IPO how much revenue #tech
item.description: Cerebras Systems has filed for an IPO, aiming to capitalize on the booming AI chip market. The company claims to produce the fastest AI hardware for training and inference, indicating strong growth potential.

item.title: Meta Plans 8,000 Job Cuts in May, With Further Layoffs Expected Later This Year
item.description: Meta Platforms plans to cut approximately 8,000 jobs, representing about 10% of its workforce, as part of a restructuring effort. This move indicates ongoing challenges in the tech industry.

item.title: llama-index-tools-instanode 0.2.0
item.description: LlamaIndex tools have been updated to version 0.2.0, allowing users to provision Postgres databases and webhooks from LlamaIndex agents on instanode.dev.

item.title: langchain-instanode 0.2.0
item.description: LangChain tools have also been updated to version 0.2.0, enabling AI agents to provision ephemeral Postgres databases and webhook receivers on instanode.dev.

item.title: llmfit: Right-sizes LLM models to your system's RAM, CPU, and GPU
item.description: The llmfit tool helps users find LLM models that fit their system's RAM, CPU, and GPU specifications with a single command.

item.title: Show HN: AgentKey – Access governance for AI agents
item.description: AgentKey provides access governance for AI agents, allowing management of SaaS tool access with human approval and audit logging.

item.title: llama-index-tools-instanode added to PyPI
item.description: LlamaIndex tools have been added to PyPI, enabling users to provision Postgres databases and webhooks from LlamaIndex agents.

item.title: langchain-instanode added to PyPI
item.description: LangChain tools have been added to PyPI, allowing AI agents to provision ephemeral Postgres databases and webhook receivers.

item.title: langchain-instanode 0.1.0
item.description: LangChain tools were initially released in version 0.1.0, enabling AI agents to provision ephemeral Postgres databases and webhook receivers.

item.title: Shinsegae pivots on AI strategy after dropping OpenAI partnership - The Korea Times
item.description: Shinsegae has shifted its AI strategy by canceling its partnership with OpenAI, indicating a major change in its AI deployment plans.

item.title: attune-rag 0.1.3
item.description: The attune-rag 0.1.3 is a lightweight, LLM-agnostic RAG pipeline that works with various LLMs, enhancing flexibility in AI applications.

item.title: Doctor-led AI platform offering 24x7 monitoring outside hospital launched in Chennai
item.description: A doctor-led AI platform has been launched in Chennai, offering 24/7 monitoring outside of hospitals, with plans for expansion in southern states.

item.title: flamehaven-filesearch 1.5.2
item.description: FLAMEHAVEN FileSearch 1.5.2 is an open-source semantic document search tool that integrates API authentication using Google Gemini. This update enhances the tool's capabilities for users seeking advanced search functionalities.

item.title: flamehaven-filesearch 1.5.1
item.description: FLAMEHAVEN FileSearch 1.5.1 is an open-source semantic document search tool with API authentication powered by Google Gemini. This version continues to improve user access to advanced search features.

item.title: flamehaven-filesearch 1.5.0
item.description: FLAMEHAVEN FileSearch 1.5.0 is an open-source semantic document search application that utilizes API authentication through Google Gemini. This version lays the groundwork for enhanced search functionalities.

item.title: TeLLMgramBot 3.13.2
item.description: TeLLMgramBot 3.13.2 is a Telegram bot powered by large language models from OpenAI and Anthropic, offering users interactive capabilities within the messaging platform. This update signifies the growing integration of AI in everyday communication tools.

item.title: hol-guard 2.0.26
item.description: HOL Guard 2.0.26 is a protective tool designed to secure local AI harnesses before they operate with various AI tools like Codex and Claude Code. This update emphasizes the importance of security in AI deployments.

item.title: iris-vector-rag 0.10.1
item.description: iris-vector-rag 0.10.1 introduces enterprise RAG pipelines with native IRIS vector search, featuring six production implementations and configurations for AWS/Azure. This development aims to streamline AI data processing without external VectorDBs.

item.title: Persistent Edge Hijacker - Aitopia Extension Reinstalls via Registry
item.description: A persistent browser hijacker named Aitopia Extension is causing issues by reinstalling itself via the registry. Users are seeking help to remove this malware affecting their browsing experience.

item.title: thaw-native 0.3.0
item.description: Thaw-native 0.3.0 is a Rust and CUDA-based extension designed for efficient data management through pipelined DMA freeze and restore functionalities. This update enhances performance for developers working with data-intensive applications.

item.title: Elon Musk fulfills teen's last wish in touching X post after she was too weak to take his call
item.description: Elon Musk honored a dying 15-year-old cancer patient by answering her handwritten questions and making her plushie a SpaceX mascot after she passed away. This gesture highlights Musk's personal connection with fans.

item.title: Becky Lynch Wins Back IC Title at WrestleMania in Win for Consistency
item.description: Becky Lynch won back the Intercontinental Title at WrestleMania, marking a significant moment in her wrestling career. This victory is celebrated as a testament to her consistency in the sport.

item.title: vox-voxtral 0.2.30
item.description: Mistral released version 0.2.30 of the Voxtral STT/TTS adapter for Vox, enhancing speech-to-text and text-to-speech functionalities. This update is significant for developers integrating voice technologies.

item.title: bernstein 1.8.8
item.description: Version 1.8.8 of the Bernstein tool introduces declarative agent orchestration aimed at improving engineering team workflows. This update is important for teams looking to streamline project management.

item.title: apple-fm-cli 0.1.2
item.description: The release of version 0.1.2 of the apple-fm-cli provides a command-line interface and HTTP server compatible with OpenAI for Apple's Foundation Models. This is significant for developers working with Apple's AI tools.

item.title: apple-fm-cli added to PyPI
item.description: The apple-fm-cli has been added to PyPI, allowing developers to easily access a command-line interface and HTTP server for Apple's Foundation Models. This addition is crucial for enhancing accessibility to Apple's AI resources.

item.title: vox-voxtral 0.2.29
item.description: Mistral released version 0.2.29 of the Voxtral STT/TTS adapter for Vox, which improves the performance of speech technologies. This update is relevant for developers focusing on voice applications.

item.title: Top 10 Mistakes Startups Make When Using AI
item.description: The article outlines the top 10 mistakes startups make when using AI, providing insights on how to avoid these pitfalls and build scalable systems. This guidance is essential for AI founders aiming for success.

item.title: JPMorgan has stark message on Qualcomm stock
item.description: JPMorgan has expressed caution regarding Qualcomm's stock ahead of its earnings report, highlighting pressures in its core handset business. This is significant for investors monitoring Qualcomm's performance.
